summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. All 40 candidate refs were hydrated as open pull requests; preflight reports no security-sensitive items. Because the job has no canonical and blocks merge/fix actions, each candidate is kept independent for per-PR proof and maintainer review.

actions.reason: Distinct open PR in a no-canonical inventory shard; no duplicate, supersession, close, merge, or fix action is proven or allowed in plan mode.
